title: Orchestrator interop: board & CLI visibility for Claude-orchestrated runs
description: The repo is now driven exclusively by Claude Code as orchestrator (per docs/claude-code-swarm-architecture.md and docs/design/execution-model-v2-epic-chaining-and-learning-loop.md). The tk CLI and both boards (local tk board, cloud) predate this and have observability gaps: the open->in_progress transition emits no activity event and never sets started_at (breaking the documented stale-recovery procedure in skills/ticks/references/claude-runner.md:356), the activity feed cannot distinguish agent actions from human actions, and cloud-side operations lose requester identity. This epic wires the claim/start signal through the CLI and store, surfaces it on the board, fixes actor attribution, and updates the orchestration skill docs to match.
